system.descriptor: Ciphers represents knowledge of coded languages and secret signs used by various organisations. Each specialisation is a separate skill.
system.uses:
Uses: Encoding and decoding secret messages, recognising coded communication, creating ciphered documents.
Chapter Runes: The unique coded language of a Space Marine Chapter.
Deathwatch: Cipher systems used by the Deathwatch for inter-Kill-team communication.
Inquisition: Codes used by the Inquisition and its agents.
War Cant: Standardised military battle-codes used across the Imperium.
Xenos Markings: Alien sigils, glyphs, and symbolic systems.
Specialisations: Chapter Runes, Deathwatch, Inquisition, War Cant, Xenos Markings. Each specialisation must be taken separately as a distinct skill.

description.value:
